name: BB:Threats: Unsafe HTTP Methods
notes: This Building Block detects when the web server unsafe http methods.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Unsafe HTTP Methods on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Request Received, Application.Request Successful, Application.Request In Progress
when the event matches LOWER("Method") MATCHES'(post|delete|patch|options|trace)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Unsafe HTTP Methods on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Request Received, Application.Request Successful, Application.Request In Progress
AND when the event matches LOWER("Method") MATCHES'(post|delete|patch|options|trace)' AQL filter query
